case_title: AIRPORT VAN RENTALS, INC. VS. TODD MICHAEL MANNING

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AIRPORT VAN RENTALS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AIRPORT VAN RENTALS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANNING, TODD MICHAEL $3,451.61 PRINCIPAL, $350.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,801.61, UNPAID RENTAL CAR FEES & $50.00 ADMINISTRATIVE FEE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO TODD MICHAEL MANNING ON 11/21/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
